rationale: Start with ClinVar, prediction, and population context, then widen to cancer evidence, trials, and literature.

ladder.command: biomcp get variant "BRAF V600E" clinvar predictions population
ladder.what_it_gives: Clinical significance, computational predictions, and allele-frequency context.

ladder.command: biomcp get variant "BRAF V600E" civic cgi
ladder.what_it_gives: Curated cancer evidence and biomarker interpretation.
Literature follow-up anchored on the variant.
